title: Adopt Deprecation Policy and Semantic Versioning
description:
Research Reports R3-094, R3-095 (Confidence 90%, Critical). The project has NO formal deprecation policy and breaking changes are introduced directly without versioning. This causes integration failures for API consumers.

Tasks:
1. Document a deprecation policy (e.g., "breaking changes announced 1 sprint before removal, old API marked [Obsolete] with message pointing to replacement")
2. Adopt semantic versioning for the Agent API surface
3. Add a BREAKING_CHANGES.md file tracking all breaking changes with before/after examples and migration guidance
4. Update CONTRIBUTING.md (or AGENTS.md) with the policy

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Delta Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
